{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Earnest
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Earnest]] is the father of [[Akura Grace]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Akura Earnest and Kiya,” Uncle Fury said. “Grace’s parents.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
